prompt: Refactor the following React component (src/components/Hero.tsx) to improve its structure, readability, and maintainability. Break it down into smaller sub-components if it makes sense, and use tailwind-merge and clsx for cleaner class management.

assertions.name: uses-sub-components
assertions.text: The main component is broken down into smaller, logical sub-components.

assertions.name: uses-clsx-twmerge
assertions.text: The refactored code uses clsx and tailwind-merge for class management.

assertions.name: preserves-functionality
assertions.text: The component preserves all original sections (Badge, Title, Subtitle, CTA, Stats).
